pages.text: A Village Guards are, like $(item)Iron Golems$(), the protectors of larger villages. They look like armored villagers and carry a bow, which they use to attack threats to the Village. When not engaged in handling a threat, they will patrol their town.

Village Guards will attack most hostile mobs and any player who attacks villagers, or have a too low reputation. They will also keep an eye out for other suspicious activities.$(br)Players with very high reputation will also be protected by the Guards, who might attack other players who attack them.

pages.title: Finding Village Guards
pages.text: Village Guards normally patrol their Villages, usually around $(item)Town Keeps$(), $(item)Watchtowers$() and $(item)Town Walls$().

pages.title: Promoting Villagers
pages.text: Players may assign guard duty to a $(item)Villager$() if they are have maximum reputation in the Village. The Player has to give the Villager a $(item)Leather jacket$(). The Villager might refuse, so persistence may be required. A villager is more likely to refuse the more trades it has available. Other Villagers will always refuse. The promotion to Village Guard is permanent.
